calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Set For Trial On Dec-02-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2023 Continued To Dec-27-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PETER QUARTAROLI, SAM'S GRILL & SEAFOOD RESTAURANT, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Defendants' "motion to strike portions of the complaint" regarding punitive damages is denied.

The complaint pleads that plaintiff was injured by a fall after defendants seated her in their restaurant near an 11-inch drop concealed by planter boxes. (Id. at 3:9-14.) The complaint also pleads a similar incident involving another patron a few days earlier that alerted defendants to the hazard. (Id. at 4:4-16.) With the complaint's other allegations, this suffices to support punitive damages at the pleading stage. Defendants appear to be under the misapprehension that "evidence" must be adduced at this stage. (Rply. 2:5-6.)

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS Peter Quartaroli and Sam's Grill & Seafood Restaurant, LL's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and the response to the complaint is now due by October 11, 2023.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
